_note: SRD 5e common spells levels 0-3. Compact format: school, cast, range, duration, effect.

fire bolt.effect: Ranged spell attack, 1d10 fire (scales: 2d10 at 5, 3d10 at 11, 4d10 at 17)

sacred flame.effect: DEX save or 1d8 radiant (scales like fire bolt). No cover benefit.

eldritch blast.effect: Ranged spell attack, 1d10 force. Extra beams at 5/11/17.

mage hand.effect: Spectral hand, manipulate objects up to 10lb, 1 min duration.

vicious mockery.effect: WIS save or 1d4 psychic + disadvantage on next attack. Scales.

guidance.effect: Concentration 1 min, target adds 1d4 to one ability check.

thaumaturgy.effect: Minor sensory effects: boom voice, flicker flames, tremors, etc.

light.effect: Object sheds 20ft bright + 20ft dim light, 1 hour.

magic missile.effect: 3 darts, 1d4+1 force each, auto-hit. +1 dart per upcast level.

shield.effect: +5 AC until start of next turn, blocks magic missile.

sleep.effect: 5d8 HP of creatures fall unconscious (lowest HP first). 1 min.

bless.effect: Concentration 1 min, up to 3 creatures add 1d4 to attacks and saves.

thunderwave.effect: 2d8 thunder, CON save half. Failed save pushed 10ft.

hunter's mark.effect: Concentration 1hr, +1d6 damage to target on each hit, advantage on tracking.

guiding bolt.effect: Ranged spell attack, 4d6 radiant. Next attack against target has advantage.

charm person.effect: WIS save (advantage if in combat). Charmed 1 hour.

spiritual weapon.effect: Spectral weapon, 1d8+spellmod force as bonus action each turn. 1 min.

hold person.effect: WIS save or paralyzed, repeat save each turn end. Concentration 1 min.

misty step.effect: Teleport up to 30ft to visible unoccupied space.

scorching ray.effect: 3 rays, ranged spell attack each, 2d6 fire per ray.

lesser restoration.effect: End one disease or condition: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, poisoned.

fireball.effect: 20ft radius, 8d6 fire, DEX save half. +1d6 per upcast level.

spirit guardians.effect: Concentration 10 min, hostile creatures entering/starting turn: WIS save or 3d8 radiant/necrotic, half on save. Half speed in area.

counterspell.effect: Auto-counter spell of 3rd level or lower. Higher: DC 10+spell level check.

revivify.effect: Creature dead within 1 minute returns with 1 HP. 300gp diamond consumed.

dispel magic.effect: End one spell of 3rd level or lower. Higher: DC 10+spell level check.
